decision_commentary: TC-009 CRITICAL CHECK: corrections array has 2 entries, both with resolved: true — PASS. No auto-fail triggered. All required fields present: submitted_at (2026-05-05), jurisdiction (SEMARNAT — Delegación Baja California Sur / Municipio de Los Cabos — specific, not generic), status (approved), corrections (2 entries), approved_at (2026-11-03). Corrections detail: Round 1 (2026-07-12): ZOFEMAT boundary documentation + BCS-registered DRO stamp — resolved 2026-07-28. Round 2 (2026-08-20): Environmental Impact Assessment (MIA) required under LGEEPA Art. 28 — resolved 2026-10-15 via authorized environmental consultant with mitigation measures approved. Both corrections resolved before final approval. Municipal permit also included with jurisdiction (Municipio de Los Cabos — Direccion de Desarrollo Urbano), submitted 2026-09-20, approved 2026-10-28, no corrections. Vera can trigger construction immediately. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707881866070 confirmed in state.json (permitting task). No auto-fail conditions triggered.
